strategy: Low-health Star boss; hit with Myth, Life, or Death (+15%) and avoid Fire, Ice, and Storm.
Enter on time; a late wizard eats a Star Mana Burn that pierces all resist for 500.
She summons a Clockworker on Round 1 (more if the party is large); clear it or race her down.
At 1,310 health a couple of blades and one hit end her quickly.
cheatNotes: Joining late gets a piercing Star Mana Burn for 500 with no resist to soften it; enter on time.
She summons a Clockworker on Round 1, and keeps summoning with three or more wizards; expect an extra minion.
